description: Research-suite hooks for research-spark 8-stage pipeline gating (prompt-based artifact checks) and scientific-review integrity tracking (command-based logging).

hooks.prompt: A research-spark or scientific-review subagent just finished. If its transcript shows a research-spark stage completion (Stage 1-8 marker like '## Stage N:' or 'artifact:'), verify the stage artifact (problem statement, falsifiable claim, pre-registration, experimental plan, analysis plan, results, discussion, manuscript) is present and named per convention. If the subagent was scientific-review, verify the referee report has all required sections (summary, strengths, weaknesses, major concerns, minor concerns, recommendation). Report any missing artifacts so the orchestrator can regenerate them before advancing.
